nodes.label: test_security_awareness.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the security-awareness synapse validator checking blocking of exec/eval usage, hardcoded passwords, and acceptance of safe code.

nodes.label: test_sequential_thinking.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the sequential-thinking synapse validator, covering circular reasoning detection and acceptance of valid linear reasoning.

nodes.label: test_synapses_executable.py
nodes.summary: Smoke tests confirming all major synapse validators are importable and executable: anti-rationalization, security-awareness, and metacognition validate calls run without error.

nodes.label: test_trust_verification.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the trust-verification synapse validator checking that critical claims without evidence are blocked and claims with evidence are accepted.

nodes.label: test_v3_agent_mcp.py
nodes.summary: Tests for v3 agent/MCP integration: AgentCapabilityProfile creation, manifest loading, and serialization; SkillManifestChecker validation (required fields, precedence tiers, conflict resolution); and MCPConnectorManager registration, routing by capability/trust tier, health tracking, and determinism.

nodes.label: test_v3_contracts.py
nodes.summary: Tests verifying v3 schema contracts: schema existence/structure/required-fields, session state transition validity, tool invocation/permission/context-handoff schema rules, negative fixture validation (ID format rejection), schema linter correctness, and v2 compatibility checks.

nodes.label: test_v3_migration.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the v3 migration dry-run system: validates all v2/v3 schemas present, modules intact, tests exist, release gates (schema, policy, replay, context, prompt quality, migration readiness), scorecard weighted scoring, and docs readiness.

nodes.label: test_v3_policy.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive tests for the v3 PolicyEngine: allow/deny/escalate rules, first-match semantics, trust tier precedence, condition evaluation (eq/neq/AND logic), schema validation (required args, type checking, pattern/enum validation), and decision artifact audit trail (format, session filtering, queryability, replayability).

nodes.label: test_v3_session.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive tests for the v3 Session state machine: all valid/invalid state transitions, recovery policy (max retries, counter increments), lifecycle (ID generation, send, abort), persistence (save/load), accumulated state mutations, correlation linking, and event log validation.

nodes.label: test_v3_telemetry.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the v3 telemetry subsystem: TelemetryEnvelope fields/checksum/retention, TelemetryCollector emit/filter operations, ReplaySnapshot determinism and persistence, ReplayHarness comparison, plus stress tests (100 rapid transitions, 1000 policy evaluations, 10000 envelopes) and failure injection scenarios.

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Virtuoso Engine component describing what it is, how it gets installed into Claude's context, its design philosophy as a compact XML prompt injection layer, file structure, and version history.

nodes.label: virtuoso.xml
nodes.summary: Large XML configuration file defining the Virtuoso engine's complete prompt injection payload, behavioral rules, and structured context for Claude. This is the actual runtime content injected into the Claude prompt.

nodes.label: .vscodeignore
nodes.summary: VS Code extension packaging exclusion list specifying files and directories to omit from the published extension package.

nodes.label: esbuild.config.mjs
nodes.summary: esbuild configuration script for bundling the VS Code extension, supporting both watch mode (for development) and production build mode with error handling.

nodes.label: next.config.js
nodes.summary: Next.js configuration for the Archon webapp, exporting minimal configuration options for the Next.js build system.

nodes.label: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration for the webapp enabling Tailwind CSS processing as a PostCSS plugin.

nodes.label: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Next.js documentation page component for the Archon webapp, rendering structured doc sections about the skills framework with metadata for SEO.

nodes.label: DocsPage
nodes.summary: Default-exported Next.js page component rendering the Archon documentation with structured sections and navigation.

nodes.label: globals.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS styles for the Archon webapp, establishing base typography, color variables, and Tailwind CSS layer directives applied to all pages.

nodes.label: registry.json
nodes.summary: Central data registry for the Archon webapp containing metadata, stats, platforms, skills, bundles, agents, pipelines, and synapses — the single source of truth consumed by the registry TypeScript module.

nodes.label: tailwind.config.js
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration for the webapp specifying content paths, theme extensions, and plugin configuration for the design system.
